# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2026 The Linux Foundation
#
# lfreleng-actions egress allow-list.
#
# Consumed via harden-runner-block-action (see README.md), which
# strips '#' comments and collapses all whitespace -- including these
# newlines -- into the single space-separated string harden-runner's
# 'allowed-endpoints' input expects. Edit this file exactly as you
# would any other list: one host[:port] entry per line, sorted
# alphabetically (LC_ALL=C). Where the reason for an entry isn't
# obvious, add a '# comment' directly above it explaining why it's
# there.
#
# A '*.host' entry is a subdomain wildcard.
#
# The per-entry comments record provenance: the service, and the tool,
# action or task observed reaching it. Most were reconstructed from
# StepSecurity run data with the github-network-audit tool
# (https://github.com/lfreleng-actions/github-network-audit); a few
# entries (e.g. harden-runner's own control-plane) are not observed in
# that data and are annotated from first principles. Coverage is
# best-effort: correct or extend a comment whenever you touch an entry.

# GitHub hosted-runner control plane (hosted-compute orchestrator and
# watchdog subdomains on GitHub-hosted runners).
*.githubapp.com:443

# GitHub user content (raw, release-assets, pkg-containers,
# github-cloud): raw file fetches, LFS objects, release assets and
# container layers.
*.githubusercontent.com:443

# Sigstore keyless signing/verification (fulcio, rekor, timestamp,
# tuf-repo-cdn): pypi-publish-action, python-build-action,
# zizmor-scan-action and ossf/scorecard-action.
*.sigstore.dev:443

# SonarQube Cloud API/scanner subdomains (api, scanner):
# sonarqube-cloud-scan-action.
*.sonarcloud.io:443

# SonarQube analysis sensor cache (AWS S3); reached by the Sonar
# scanner via sonarqube-cloud-scan-action.
analysis-sensorcache-eu-central-1-prod.s3.amazonaws.com:443

# Azul Zulu JDK metadata API (Java toolchain setup).
api.azul.com:443

# Google deps.dev API, queried by the OpenSSF Scorecard action.
api.deps.dev:443

# GitHub REST API: gh CLI, Scorecard, and Python/action clients
# across org CI.
api.github.com:443

# OSV vulnerability DB, queried by the OpenSSF Scorecard
# 'Vulnerabilities' check (ossf/scorecard-action).
api.osv.dev:443

# OpenSSF Scorecard API, published to by ossf/scorecard-action.
api.scorecard.dev:443

# 1Password (AgileBits) app-update check (1Password CLI secret fetch).
app-updates.agilebits.com:443

# Astral (uv) site: uv installer bootstrap used by the Python actions
# (e.g. gerrit-clone-action, python-sbom-action).
astral.sh:443

# Docker Hub registry auth, used by docker buildx/build-push and helm.
auth.docker.io:443

# Ubuntu package archive over apt (go-httpbin-action,
# python-build-action).
azure.archive.ubuntu.com:80

# SonarSource scanner binary download; sonarqube-cloud-scan-action.
binaries.sonarsource.com:443

# Automotive Linux (AGL) build infrastructure; LF project CI.
build.automotivelinux.org:443

# 1Password (AgileBits) cache endpoint (1Password CLI secret fetch).
cache.agilebits.com:443

# Azul Zulu JDK download CDN (Java toolchain setup).
cdn.azul.com:443

# Debian package archive over apt; container/base-image builds.
deb.debian.org:80

# Alpine Linux package CDN over apk; container image builds.
dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org:443

# Google download server, fetched by go-httpbin-action and
# python-build-action.
dl.google.com:443

# SonarQube scanner data bucket (AWS S3); reached by the Sonar
# scanner via sonarqube-cloud-scan-action.
dna-visualization-scannerdata-eu-central-1-prod.s3.amazonaws.com:443

# endoflife.date API, queried by build-metadata-action for runtime
# end-of-life data.
endoflife.date:443

# Ubuntu ESM package archive over apt (go-httpbin-action,
# python-build-action).
esm.ubuntu.com:443

# PostHog EU ingestion endpoint; the AI slop scan workflows
# (aislop-scan-action) send telemetry here.
eu.i.posthog.com:443

# Python package files (PyPI CDN): pip/uv wheel and sdist downloads
# across org CI.
files.pythonhosted.org:443

# Mozilla release archive, fetched by python-build-action.
ftp.mozilla.org:443

# Gerrit (Automotive Linux): git clone via gerrit-clone-action.
gerrit.automotivelinux.org:443

# Gerrit (FD.io): git clone via gerrit-clone-action.
gerrit.fd.io:443

# Gerrit (LF Broadband): git clone via gerrit-clone-action.
gerrit.lfbroadband.org:443

# Gerrit (Linux Foundation): git clone via gerrit-clone-action.
gerrit.linuxfoundation.org:443

# Gerrit (O-RAN-SC) SSH port: git-over-SSH clone and ssh-keyscan.
gerrit.o-ran-sc.org:29418

# Gerrit (O-RAN-SC) HTTPS: git clone via gerrit-clone-action and
# python-test-action.
gerrit.o-ran-sc.org:443

# Gerrit (ONAP): git clone via gerrit-clone-action and
# python-test-action.
gerrit.onap.org:443

# Anchore installer (grype download for anchore/scan-action).
get.anchore.io:443

# Helm release downloads (azure/setup-helm).
get.helm.sh:443

# GitHub Container Registry: docker build-push/login and helm pulls.
ghcr.io:443

# Gerrit (OpenDaylight): git clone via gerrit-clone-action and
# python-test-action.
git.opendaylight.org:443

# GitHub SSH: git-over-SSH checkout in python-test-action.
github.com:22

# GitHub over HTTPS: git/LFS clone, releases and API across org CI.
github.com:443

# Grype vulnerability DB (anchore/scan-action/download-grype).
grype.anchore.io:443

# Jenkins CI (FD.io); LF project infrastructure reached by org CI.
jenkins.fd.io:443

# Jenkins CI (LF Broadband); LF project infrastructure.
jenkins.lfbroadband.org:443

# Jenkins CI (O-RAN-SC); LF project infrastructure.
jenkins.o-ran-sc.org:443

# Jenkins CI (ONAP); LF project infrastructure.
jenkins.onap.org:443

# Jenkins CI (OpenDaylight); LF project infrastructure.
jenkins.opendaylight.org:443

# Jira (Linux Foundation); LF project issue tracker.
jira.linuxfoundation.org:443

# Jira (O-RAN-SC); LF project issue tracker.
jira.o-ran-sc.org:443

# Jira (ONAP); LF project issue tracker.
jira.onap.org:443

# Jira (OpenDaylight); LF project issue tracker.
jira.opendaylight.org:443

# OpenPGP keyserver; GPG public-key fetch via dirmngr during
# package/signature verification.
keys.openpgp.org:443

# Ubuntu GPG keyserver; public-key fetch via dirmngr, also reached
# by the Sonar scanner (sonarqube-cloud-scan-action).
keyserver.ubuntu.com:443

# Jira Cloud (LF O-RAN-SC tenant); LF project issue tracker.
lf-o-ran-sc.atlassian.net:443

# Jira Cloud (LF ONAP tenant); LF project issue tracker.
lf-onap.atlassian.net:443

# Jira Cloud (LF OpenDaylight tenant); LF project issue tracker.
lf-opendaylight.atlassian.net:443

# 1Password vault (Linux Foundation tenant); secret retrieval.
linuxfoundation.1password.com:443

# Linux Foundation website (wget fetches).
linuxfoundation.org:443

# Ubuntu message-of-the-day service (runner OS).
motd.ubuntu.com:443

# Nexus artifact repository (ONAP); LF project artifacts (Java/Python).
nexus.onap.org:443

# Nexus3 artifact repository (O-RAN-SC); LF project artifacts.
nexus3.o-ran-sc.org:443

# 1Password vault (O-RAN-SC tenant); secret retrieval via the op CLI.
o-ran-sc.1password.com:443

# OSS-Fuzz build-log bucket, queried by the Scorecard 'Fuzzing'
# check (ossf/scorecard-action).
oss-fuzz-build-logs.storage.googleapis.com:443

# Microsoft package archive over apt (go-httpbin-action,
# python-build-action).
packages.microsoft.com:443

# StepSecurity harden-runner control-plane API (agent policy and
# telemetry). Not observed in the audit data; required by the
# harden-runner agent itself.
prod.app-api.stepsecurity.io:443

# Docker Hub CDN (Cloudflare); image layer downloads.
production.cloudflare.docker.com:443

# Docker Hub CDN (CloudFront); docker build-push image layers.
production.cloudfront.docker.com:443

# Go module proxy (go build/test/audit actions).
proxy.golang.org:443

# Python Package Index: pip/uv installs across org CI.
pypi.org:443

# Docker Hub registry: docker build-push and helm image pulls.
registry-1.docker.io:443

# npm registry: node-build-action, node-audit-action,
# path-check-action and aislop-scan-action.
registry.npmjs.org:443

# Astral uv release downloads (uv installer).
releases.astral.sh:443

# Maven Central (Apache); Java dependency downloads.
repo.maven.apache.org:443

# Maven Central (repo1); Java dependency downloads.
repo1.maven.org:443

# Slack API; slackapi/slack-github-action notifications.
slack.com:443

# SonarQube Cloud apex host; sonarqube-cloud-scan-action.
sonarcloud.io:443

# Rust static assets (toolchain/metadata), fetched by
# build-metadata-action.
static.rust-lang.org:443

# Google Cloud Storage; Go tooling downloads (go-build/test/audit and
# sbom-action).
storage.googleapis.com:443

# Go checksum database (go-audit-action, sbom-action).
sum.golang.org:443

# LF Support / ServiceDesk; LF project infrastructure reached by
# org CI.
support.linuxfoundation.org:443

# TestPyPI; pre-release uploads via pypi-publish-action.
test.pypi.org:443

# Azure blob storage serving GitHub's artifact attestation bundles,
# fetched by 'gh attestation verify' (zizmor-scan-action).
tmaproduction.blob.core.windows.net:443

# GitHub TUF trust root, fetched by 'gh attestation verify' when
# checking the Sigstore provenance of the zizmor binary
# (zizmor-scan-action).
tuf-repo.github.com:443

# PyPI upload endpoint; package publishing via pypi-publish-action.
upload.pypi.org:443

# GitHub uploads: CodeQL SARIF (github/codeql-action) and
# release-assets-action.
uploads.github.com:443

# Go vulnerability DB via govulncheck (go-audit-action).
vuln.go.dev:443

# OpenSSF Best Practices badge service, queried by the Scorecard
# 'CII-Best-Practices' check (ossf/scorecard-action).
www.bestpractices.dev:443

# Google (wget); connectivity and asset fetches.
www.google.com:443

# Linux Foundation website (wget fetches).
www.linuxfoundation.org:443
